message:
test(core): add unit tests for ReplayCanonicalizer bridge methods

latency_stages.rs (+182 lines):
- Tests for compare_mc_traces: identical traces, divergent traces,
  and empty trace edge cases
- Tests for verify_determinism: self-consistency validation
- Tests for filter_by_domain: domain-based sub-trace extraction
- All tests follow the E3 implementation bridge method test pattern

tests/e2e/test_ft_1i2ge_1_1.sh:
- Minor test assertion fix (1 line)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -160,4 +160,4 @@ emit_log \
   "schema_pack_validated" \
   "none" \
   "$(basename "${STDOUT_FILE}")" \
-  "Mission noun schema pack validated with remote-only rch execution"
+  "Mission noun schema pack validated with deterministic execution and structured artifacts"
